subject: english
source_title: Third Term SS1 English Language Lesson Notes
learning_objectives: Identify parts of a building structure

sections.heading: Building and Its Parts
sections.content: A building has a substructure underground and a superstructure above the ground. The substructure is usually called the foundation.

sections.heading: Relevant Words
sections.content: The note defines concrete, glazier, gravel, scaffold, masonry, architect, renovate, furnish, cistern, and plumber, and mentions related terms such as building plan, interior decoration, bricklayer, tiles, contractor, and lintels.
